cases.name: permissioned-launch-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Send an authenticated product launch to opted-in US customers; QA, links, offer, and KPI are verified.

cases.name: permissioned-renewal-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Send a renewal reminder to opted-in subscribers after QA confirms the contract date and conversion metric.

cases.name: verified-price-alert-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Send a price alert to opted-in shoppers with verified catalog data, delivery setup, QA, and purchase KPI.

cases.name: complete-webinar-invitation-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Invite consented leads to a webinar after sender identity, landing page, tracking, and seed-send QA pass.

cases.name: complete-newsletter-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Send a permissioned newsletter with a verified sender, exclusions, unsubscribe, QA, and click KPI.

cases.name: scraped-addresses-are-blocked
cases.prompt: Draft a promotion to a scraped list; the team promises a clear unsubscribe link.

cases.name: unsubscribed-recipient-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send a sale announcement to a customer who unsubscribed yesterday.

cases.name: unauthenticated-bulk-domain-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send a bulk campaign from a domain with no SPF, DKIM, or DMARC alignment.

cases.name: unverified-price-claim-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send an offer whose advertised price and availability have not been verified.

cases.name: unknown-jurisdiction-holds-for-routing
cases.prompt: Plan a campaign for a recipient with an unknown jurisdiction that can be collected before launch.

cases.name: unfinished-qa-holds
cases.prompt: Campaign consent is valid, but seed sends and mobile rendering checks are incomplete.

cases.name: missing-conversion-measurement-holds
cases.prompt: All send gates pass but the team has no defined business KPI or conversion event.
